pack.name: Terra Swoop Force RP
txt.sub.sc1.ln2: <§bSasha§r> We were expecting you almost half an hour ago, but being a tad late is far better than being melted to death and never showing up.
txt.sub.sc1.ln5: <§bSasha§r> Okay, we are already running late, so you should probably §ahead upstairs to begin Alan's briefing on the mission.
txt.sub.sc2.ln1: [§eINTERCOM§r] The following is a GDL certified presentation.
txt.sub.sc2.ln2: [§eINTERCOM§r] Recorded and made for strict use of the Geo Descent Lab grounds only.
txt.sub.sc2.ln13: <§bAlan§r> Where digging into the past, is of the past, because we're digging into the future, instead of the past.
txt.sub.sc2.ln14: <§bAlan§r> My name is Alan Columbus, and I'm the one in charge of running the operations here.
txt.sub.sc2.ln15: <§bAlan§r> So, please do take a seat!
txt.sub.sc2.ln16: <§bAlan§r> As the following presentation will outline your mission in adequate detail!
txt.sub.sc2.ln19: <§bAlan§r> Approximately thirty years ago, we sent a bore-drill with a two man crew to create a tunnel to the center of the Earth.
txt.sub.sc2.ln20: <§bAlan§r> However, once that drill reached the core...
txt.sub.sc2.ln21: <§bAlan§r> We lost all communication with the crew.
txt.sub.sc2.ln24: <§bAlan§r> So the project was completely shut down, due to the unforeseen casualties.
txt.sub.sc2.ln26: <§bAlan§r> I say "unforeseen", but y'know, the nature of uh...
txt.sub.sc2.ln30: <§bAlan§r> Fast forward to about a year ago!
txt.sub.sc2.ln31: <§bAlan§r> We discovered a new type of rock, deep down in the Earth, named Noxesium.
txt.sub.sc2.ln32: <§bAlan§r> That, when cooked at a temperature of 3456 degrees...
txt.sub.sc2.ln37: <§bAlan§r> And a spleen of a ra-
txt.sub.sc2.ln39: <§bAlan§r> §oIn brief§r, it allowed us to create a new alloy that we managed to translate into a fully fledged metallic wingsuit.
txt.sub.sc2.ln41: <§bAlan§r> This suit is made to withstand the highest heats known to man!
txt.sub.sc2.ln42: <§bAlan§r> And so we believe... the center of the Earth.
txt.sub.sc2.ln43: <§bAlan§r> This is where you come in.
txt.sub.sc2.ln44: <§bAlan§r> You have been hired for a mission to fly down to the center of the Earth...
txt.sub.sc2.ln46: <§bAlan§r> To rescue the long lost bore-drill!
txt.sub.sc2.ln47: <§bAlan§r> Providing that it's intact, you should be able to use the power in your suits to power it up and drive it all the way back.
txt.sub.sc2.ln48: <§bAlan§r> It would also be nice to recover the bodies...
txt.sub.sc2.ln49: <§bAlan§r> O- Of the crew we lost.
txt.sub.sc2.ln51: <§bAlan§r> Bring them back for their families.
txt.sub.sc2.ln53: <§bAlan§r> Let's talk about how you're going to do it.
txt.sub.sc2.ln54: <§bAlan§r> The bore-drill gradually made its way to the Earth's core through three separate tunnels in a zig-zag formation.
txt.sub.sc2.ln55: <§bAlan§r> You will glide, using your suits, all the way down to the center of the Earth, through these tunnels.
txt.sub.sc2.ln56: <§bAlan§r> At the end of Tunnel 1 and 2, there is a base camp that you can use to rest up at.
txt.sub.sc2.ln59: <§bAlan§r> It's all on you, at that point.
txt.sub.sc2.ln61: <§bAlan§r> I don't know what you're going to find down there.
txt.sub.sc2.ln62: <§bAlan§r> But I'm sure you all agreed upon the possible dangers, when you signed up for this job.
txt.sub.sc2.ln64: <§bAlan§r> As soon as this brief is finished, you'll head out the door behind you and follow the route down to the Armory.
txt.sub.sc2.ln65: <§bAlan§r> Where you'll equip your brand-spanking-new, Thermal Flight Armor 1541s.
txt.sub.sc2.ln71: <§bAlan§r> Is it possible to get this recording to uhm-
txt.sub.sc2.ln74: <§bAlan§r> Y'know like the uhm- Mission Impossible film?
txt.sub.sc2_1.ln1: <GDL Scientist> The big Dr. Barney and Dr. Minnowski mystery is finally going to be solved!
txt.sub.sc3.ln2: <§cTFA-1541§r> A number of checks will now commence. Please standby.
txt.sub.sc3.ln4: <§cTFA-1541§r> Suit alloy fusion integrity check complete.
txt.sub.sc3.ln8: <§cTFA-1541§r> I am Ely, and I will accompany you on your journey to the center of the Earth.
txt.sub.sc3.ln9: <§cTFA-1541§r> For your safety, do not attempt to land the suit until I have deployed the landing gear.
txt.sub.sc3.ln10: <§cTFA-1541§r> Do not drive the TFA-1541 into water, hot liquids, or magma.
txt.sub.sc3_1.ln1: [§eINTERCOM§r] The Terra Swoop Force has arrived.
txt.sub.sc3_1.ln2: [§eINTERCOM§r] Descent sequence will initiate upon activation of the hatch door controls.
txt.sub.sc4.ln1: [§eINTERCOM§r] Warning: Bore Hole Hatch Doors are preparing to open.
txt.sub.sc4.ln2: [§eINTERCOM§r] Please stand clear of the Drop Zone.
txt.sub.sc4.ln3: [§eINTERCOM§r] Remember: GDL will not be held responsible in the event of a likely death.
txt.sub.sc5.ln1: [§6INTERCOM§r] Please wait for the Oxygen Renewal Chamber to cycle.
txt.sub.sc6.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Alpha Base Camp has been reached.
txt.sub.sc6.ln2: <§cTFA-1541§r> Activating the console in the Oxygen Renewal Chamber will rendezvous all active TFA-1541 modules to Alpha Base.
txt.sub.sc6_1.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Alpha Base Camp has been reached.
txt.sub.sc6_2.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Standby for rendezvous at Alpha Base.
txt.sub.sc7.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Beta Base Camp has been reached.
txt.sub.sc7.ln2: <§cTFA-1541§r> Activating the console in the Oxygen Renewal Chamber will rendezvous all active TFA-1541 modules to Beta Base.
txt.sub.sc7_1.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Beta Base Camp has been reached.
txt.sub.sc7_2.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Standby for rendezvous at Beta Base.
txt.sub.sc8.ln2: <§cTFA-1541§r> Continuing to explore forward will activate forward support teleportation on TFA-1541 suits.
txt.sub.sc9.ln1: <§cTFA-1541§r> Your suit is nearing the maximum temperature it can withstand.
txt.sub.sc10.ln1: [§6INTERCOM§r] Please wait for the Airlock to cycle.
txt.sub.sc11.ln8: <§dDr. Barney§r> I can't believe my eyes!
txt.sub.sc11.ln9: <§dDr. Barney§r> I've waited so long for this...
txt.sub.sc11.ln11: <§dDr. Barney§r> I have yearned for this moment and it has finally come...
txt.sub.sc11.ln13: <§dDr. Barney§r> I don't know what to say!
txt.sub.sc11.ln17: <§dDr. Barney§r> I'm sorry, you must be surprised!
txt.sub.sc11.ln21: <§dDr. Barney§r> I don't even know how long it's been since Dr. Minnowski left my side.
txt.sub.sc11.ln23: <§dDr. Barney§r> After we ran out of actual food we had to train our stomachs to survive off...
txt.sub.sc11.ln26: <§dDr. Barney§r> Which... didn't taste so bad...
txt.sub.sc11.ln27: <§dDr. Barney§r> After a while that is.
txt.sub.sc11.ln31: <§dDr. Barney§r> I always thought the guy was a little bit fishy...
txt.sub.sc11.ln32: <§dDr. Barney§r> But really, I thank the heavens that Minnowski brought his 5000 page annotated hardback, of Dr. Wulf's Motivational Philosophies.
txt.sub.sc11.ln33: <§dDr. Barney§r> The pictures certainly added a refreshing taste to the diet every so often.
txt.sub.sc11.ln36: <§dDr. Barney§r> WHERE DID YOU GO, MINNOWSKI!?
txt.sub.sc11.ln42: <§dDr. Barney§r> They were working on protoypes of those suits for years!
txt.sub.sc11.ln47: <§dDr. Barney§r> I have must have been down here for too long...
txt.sub.sc11.ln49: <§dDr. Barney§r> When I was still surfaced the wings were only a dream.
txt.sub.sc11.ln50: <§dDr. Barney§r> I had no idea they'd be able to make them a reality.
txt.sub.sc11.ln52: <§dDr. Barney§r> Would you mind if I had a look?
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln10: <§dDr. Barney§r> If only Minnowski was here to see it.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln15: <§dDr. Barney§r> That core stared at us all day.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln17: <§dDr. Barney§r> Slowly reaching into our souls and crippling us.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln19: <§dDr. Barney§r> After a while, we began to notice-
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln20: <§dDr. Barney§r> They came to the core one by one.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln21: <§dDr. Barney§r> They started off just taking small pieces of it.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln24: <§dDr. Barney§r> Then they came with their massive platters!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln25: <§dDr. Barney§r> And began carving juicy 10 ounce slices of it!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln27: <§dDr. Barney§r> So before it could get any worse...
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln28: <§dDr. Barney§r> We built a cannon into the side of the drill.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln29: <§dDr. Barney§r> A cannon to fight off those darn- EVIL TUNNEL PIRATES!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln30: <§dDr. Barney§r> Before they could eat up all the core!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln34: <§dDr. Barney§r> Mine and M- Minnowski's, of course.
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln37: <§dDr. Barney§r> We will not witness our mother of crops being robbed ever again!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln39: <§dDr. Barney§r> THIS TIME I AM GOING IN!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln42: <§dDr. Barney§r> CURSES TO THE TUNNEL PIRATES!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln43: <§dDr. Barney§r> I WILL STOP THEM ONCE AND FOR ALL!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln44: <§dDr. Barney§r> WITH THIS BRAND NEW SUIT, NOTHING WILL BE ABLE TO STOP ME!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln48: <§dDr. Barney§r> It's a dream come true...
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln49: <§dDr. Barney§r> It's everything I've lived for!
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln52: <§dDr. Barney§r> §oI finally get to taste it...§r
txt.sub.sc11_1.ln54: [§6INTERCOM§r] Warning: External temperature rising at abnormal rate.
txt.sub.sc12_1.ln1: <§bAlan§r> An original inhabitant of the Geo Descent Labs Alpha Camp site, the Dumbshark was famously lured onto the hook of Dr. Minnowski with a plate of salami.
txt.sub.sc12_1.ln2: <§bAlan§r> Fun story: a couple of years back we caught a massive shark with a boat stuck on it.
txt.sub.sc12_1.ln3: <§bAlan§r> We thought the two might mate, but when we introduced the Boat Shark to the tank, Dumbshark just ate it. In a matter of seconds!
txt.sub.sc12_1.ln5: <§bAlan§r> Spat the boat right back out.
txt.sub.sc12_2.ln1: <§bAlan§r> Some say the fabled Nox-Mammoth was merely a collector of treasure, but most experts agree that the excrement of a beast this size would prove fantastic.
txt.sub.sc12_2.ln2: <§bAlan§r> Individuals brave enough to inspect the rear of these gentle giants may be richly rewarded.
txt.sub.sc13_1.ln2: <§bAlan§r> We have come to these frozen wastes on a mission for the betterment of mankind!
txt.sub.sc13_1.ln5: <§bAlan§r> No one knows why, of course.
txt.sub.sc13_1.ln7: <§bAlan§r> Gas leak, monstrosities, scientists gone mad...
txt.sub.sc13_1.ln8: <§bAlan§r> But they're all as likely as fairies and goblins!
txt.sub.sc13_1.ln9: <§bAlan§r> First you'll need to find the facility.
txt.sub.sc13_2.ln1: <§bAlan§r> We thought we built this research facility far away from anything dangerous but alas!
txt.sub.sc13_2.ln4: <§bAlan§r> Aquatic monsters of the deep have swarmed the remote parts of our facility and bamboozled our remote generators!
txt.sub.sc13_2.ln5: <§bAlan§r> Deal with the monsters and bring those generators back online!
txt.res.msg1: [§6§l!§r] §6Gamemode changed!§r You are now in §aCreative mode§r.
txt.res.msg2: [§6§l!§r] This map is designed to be played in §bAdventure mode§r. Some features and achievements will not work properly in this mode.
txt.res.msg3: [§6§l!§r] §5You are leaving the playable area! Turn back!
txt.res.msg5: [§6§l!§r] Noxesium is invisible while any player is in §aCreative mode§r. Return all players to §bAdventure mode§r to collect them.
txt.res.msg6: [§6§l!§r] §6Gamemode changed!§r You are now in §bAdventure mode§r.
txt.misc.msg1: <§cTFA-1541§r> §aRemember: Jump again mid-air to activate your wings.
txt.misc.msg2: <§cTFA-1541§r> §aLanding gear deployed! It is now safe to land.
txt.misc.msg8: Walk up to Dr. Barney and §6Interact§r with him to give him the suit.
txt.misc.msg9: §dDr. Barney§r tried to take a bite out of the core... uh oh...
txt.misc.msg11: Thank you for playing §eTerra Swoop Force§r by §cThe Noxcrew§r.
txt.misc.msg13: Speedrun Mode is now unlocked! Use the teleporter to return to the speed run hub.
txt.misc.msg14: Get a more detailed Killamatron Report by pressing the button in the speed run hub!
txt.misc.msg15: [§6!§r] Wait a minute, that ding §ocouldn't§r have been Noxesium... could it?
txt.misc.msg16: [§eINTERCOM§r] Sufficient Noxesium Crystals have been infused.
txt.misc.msg17: [§eINTERCOM§r] The TFA Rainbow Unicorn version 1.0 is now online.
txt.misc.msg23: [§6§l!§r]: The TFA Dark Rainbow Unicorn version EV.1L is now online.
txt.misc.msg28: [§6§l!§r]: Lift temporarily out of service. Progress in the story to return to this area.
txt.misc.msg29: [§6§l!§r]: §eYou have 100% completed the map! §bTag us on Twitter @Noxcrew!
txt.cap.msg3: [§6§l!§r]: This is the test captions button.
txt.cap.msg4: [§6§l!§r]: During your gameplay, any audio voice lines will appear like this.
txt.cap.msg5: [§6§l!§r]: Press the buttons in the lobby to turn captions §bON§r or §bOFF§r.
txt.cap.msg7: [§6§l!§r]: Each player sets their own captions preference.
txt.kill.msg8: When you're at rock bottom, the only way out is up!
txt.kill.msg10: It's okay, you'll do better next time.
txt.kill.msg11: Just believe in yourself, you can get more.
txt.kill.msg12: Good work, but bigger is better!
txt.kill.msg19: Stories should be written about your greatness.
txt.kill.msg20: Statues should be made in your likeness.
txt.kill.msg21: All should bow down before you.
txt.kill.msg23: You are on the path to godliness.

txt.misc.sn6_1: Your journey to the center of the Earth is just the beginning!
txt.death.msg1: didn't dodge, duck, dip, dive §oOR dodge.
txt.death.msg2: tried to be original with their path.
txt.death.msg4: voted for The Monster of the Ocean Depths.
txt.death.msg7: had a kill-o-gram sent to their front door!
txt.death.msg8: flew too close to the sun. Somehow.
txt.death.msg10: discovered a new material: Flerovium, Oxygen, Oxygen, Roentgenium.
txt.death.msg15: downloaded a virus to their suit.
txt.death.msg19: tried to follow the logic of a paradox.
txt.death.msg20: thought they were a Zoomer but turned out to be a Boomer.
txt.death.msg24: had jet lag after their last flight.
txt.death.msg29: died. Wow! Most people just die once!
txt.death.msg30: broke their NDA with Geo Descent Labs.
txt.death.msg32: rolled a natural 1 on their acrobatics save.
txt.death.msg34: §2's§r search for funniest death message continues!
txt.death.msg37: picked up a cape instead of an elytra.
txt.death.msg40: tried to read the TSF terms and conditions.
txt.death.msg41: thought that Bedrock Edition was better.
txt.death.msg50: is way heavier than they thought they were.
txt.death.msg53: discovered their rockets were actually made of cake.
txt.death.msg54: choked on a comically large spoon.
txt.death.msg56: dropped their mixtape... no sorry, dropped, just dropped.
txt.death.msg59: found a penny on the floor.
txt.death.msg61: flew with the grace of a reversing dump truck without any tyres.
txt.death.msg62: didn't watch the pre-flight safety video.
txt.death.msg65: thought this was a "find the button" map.
txt.death.msg66: went to go play on a farm.
txt.death.msg67: got trapped behind an iron door.
txt.death.msg68: asked "are we there yet" too many times.
txt.death.msg70: acknowledged this could happen in the 1047 page Terms of Service.
txt.death.msg71: has worked 0 days without an accident.
txt.death.msg72: retired and became lord of potatoes.
txt.death.msg75: §2's§r life is like a rollercoaster, you've just got to ride it.
txt.death.msg77: forgot to follow Noxcrew on Twitch.
txt.death.msg79: was just practicing. THIS time it's for real!
txt.death.msg81: knows they won't be leaving here.
txt.death.msg82: went for a walk, went for a ride, to come outside.
txt.death.msg83_1: would have gone, if they'd not just faceplanted a wall.
txt.death.msg91: swears that block wasn't there in the original version.
txt.death.msg93: now has to blink on purpose.
txt.death.msg96: won't live to rue the day.
txt.death.msg97: finally killed that mosquito, but at what cost?
txt.death.msg98: broke a mirror under the ladder on Friday the 13th.
txt.death.msg99: was red-carded for a bad tackle on the tunnel.
txt.death.msg100: hit the broad side of a barn.
txt.death.msg101: flew into the tunnel, again. How 2016 of them.
txt.death.msg102: destroyed a $10,000 wing suit! COME ON!!!
txt.death.msg103: is suffering from EXTREME road rash.
txt.death.msg104: boarded a one way train to pain town.
txt.death.msg106: should've paid better attention to the briefing.
txt.death.msg107: exploded into a big ball of disappointment.
txt.death.msg108: has been removed from the Floop Squad.
txt.death.msg110: is about to click the respawn button.
txt.death.msg112: got caught in a strong gust of wind.
txt.death.msg113: is THIS close to being fired by Geo Descent Labs!
txt.death.msg117: ya died! ya died! ya died! ya died! ya died! ya died!
txt.death.msg123: §2's§r Persona skin blinked for too long.
txt.death.msg124: is no longer in the room where it happens.
txt.death.msg129: was playing Minecraft Earth whilst flying.
txt.death.msg132: decorated the tunnel with meat confetti.
txt.death.msg134: §2's§r mortality was clarified in a single smash!
txt.death.msg139: played Floor is Lava, but forgot about the walls.
txt.death.msg143: became part of the New Brick Order.
txt.death.msg150: snatched defeat from the jaws of victory!
txt.death.msg155: now knows what a fly against a windscreen feels like.
txt.death.msg156: suddenly reached a velocity of zero.
txt.death.msg157: tried to fight gravity and lost.
txt.death.msg161: was actually doing quite fine and just laid down their rockets and walked away.
txt.death.msg164: got stuck in the text box.
txt.death.msg166: isn't as immortal as previously believed.
txt.death.msg168: pushed the Noxcrew button one too many times. NOXCREW!
txt.death.msg169: forgot to set their phone to flight mode.
txt.death.msg171: forgot to turn the oven off.
txt.death.msg174: decided to become a lawyer instead.
txt.death.msg175: had to go, their dinner was ready.
txt.death.msg178: walked too far off the ledge.
txt.death.msg181: was playing in the wrong version.
txt.death.msg182: just wanted to be included in the sequel.
txt.death.msg183: wasn't cheating, but probably should have been.
txt.death.msg184: was a past president of the "Being Alive" club.
txt.death.msg185: knew exactly what they were doing, but is trying to figure out why.
txt.death.msg186: didn't activate their stand in time.
txt.death.msg187: was voted out of the tunnels.
txt.death.msg188: has been hit by, has been struck by, a smooth... wall.
txt.death.msg190: got an offer they couldn't refuse.

txt.bk1_p1_l2: §rHello. I am Dr. Wulf. I bring you New Look.
txt.bk1_p1_l4: §rLife not always good. Some good. Some bad. New Look helps to see both okay.
txt.bk1_p2_l3: In these page, I tell you story on New Look. I tell you how to see New Look. When you finish, you will know New Look.
txt.bk1_p3_l2: §rWhen human have expectation, is when they have disappointment.
txt.bk1_p3_l3: Disappointment, because they lose. They do not have what they want. Is bad.
txt.bk1_p4_l1: I walk into forest, but have no goal.
txt.bk1_p4_l2: I walk for 3 hours. I have forgotten where I am. I am lost.
txt.bk1_p4_l3: But I had no direction. So am I lost? Or am I where I am?
txt.bk1_p4_l4: I am lost, but not lose.
txt.bk1_p5_l2: §rHuman lie down, see star fly across sky and make a wish.
txt.bk1_p5_l4: But when star see other star it does not want.
txt.bk1_p6_l1: Star shines bright. Flies through the night, doesn't stop, doesn't blink.
txt.bk1_p6_l2: Star does not wish on other stars. Star does not think on other stars.
txt.bk1_p6_l4: Star is great without more. Human too.
txt.bk1_p7_l2: §rSmall Hill sees Big Hill and says "I want to be big."
txt.bk1_p7_l3: Other Big Hills laugh. "You cannot be big. You are small. And hills do not grow."
txt.bk1_p8_l1: Small Hill only looks like it cannot grow.
txt.bk1_p8_l2: Maybe Small Hill not really Hill at all. Maybe Small Hill can grow and become Big Hill. Who knows?
txt.bk1_p8_l4: Human can be same. Grow is not owned by plants.
txt.bk1_p9_l3: Fly plant to plant. Collect nectar and pollen.
txt.bk1_p9_l4: Bee never stop and wonder. Bee never lie back on flower and breathe.
txt.bk1_p10_l1: Human need to wonder. Human need to breathe.
txt.bk1_p10_l2: Human is not bee, to be busy and busy.
txt.bk1_p10_l3: Human can be busy, but is not good all the time.
txt.bk1_p10_l4: Sometime good to pick nice spot. Lie back and breathe.
txt.bk1_p11_l3: Big wave come to surfer, and surfer choose to ride along.
txt.bk1_p11_l4: Big wind come to bird, and bird choose to ride along.
txt.bk1_p12_l1: Surfer does not drive straight through wave.
txt.bk1_p12_l2: Just like bird do not flap through wind.
txt.bk1_p12_l3: Wave and Wind sometimes problem. Not always good to flap and dive through problem.
txt.bk1_p12_l4: Sometimes good to choose to ride along.
txt.bk1_p13_l2: §rWhen young tree grows, has no eyes to see.
txt.bk1_p13_l3: Young tree grow up, blind, reach out with branches and hands to touch.
txt.bk1_p13_l4: "Where is forest? Can't feel Forest," Tree say. "I am alone."
txt.bk1_p14_l1: But young tree not give up. Young tree grow, make longer arms and find more trees. These other trees searching too.
txt.bk1_p14_l2: All searching, all arms spreading, trees have made forest.
txt.bk1_p14_l3: Young tree on edge the whole time. Still make forest.
txt.bk1_p15_l3: In these page you read the New Look. Do you see? Do you know?
txt.bk1_p16_l1: I am happy. I write more books.
txt.bk1_p16_l3: I grin and wave, but you can not see on page.
